input.command:
export WINEPREFIX=/Users/steven/.lcwine
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"

echo "=== 1. graceful: wineserver -k ==="
"$COH/wine/bin/wineserver" -k 2>/dev/null && echo "  wineserver -k sent" || echo "  (wineserver already down or -k failed)"
sleep 3

echo
echo "=== 2. force-kill any stragglers by exact path match ==="
# LaunchCat coh wine processes
for pid in $(ps ax -o pid,command | grep -iE 'LaunchCat/coh/wine|LaunchCat/coh/launch\.sh|\.lcwine' | grep -v grep | awk '{print $1}'); do
  cmd=$(ps -p "$pid" -o command= 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$cmd" ]; then echo "  kill -TERM $pid"; kill -TERM "$pid" 2>/dev/null; fi
done
sleep 2
# anything still alive -> KILL
for pid in $(ps ax -o pid,command | grep -iE 'LaunchCat/coh/wine|LaunchCat/coh/launch\.sh|\.lcwine' | grep -v grep | awk '{print $1}'); do
  echo "  kill -KILL $pid (stubborn)"; kill -KILL "$pid" 2>/dev/null
done

echo
echo "=== 3. quit LaunchCat.app GUI host if running ==="
if pgrep -f 'LaunchCat.app/Contents/MacOS' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  osascript -e 'quit app "LaunchCat"' 2>/dev/null || true
  sleep 2
  pkill -f 'LaunchCat.app/Contents/MacOS' 2>/dev/null && echo "  force-quit LaunchCat GUI" || echo "  LaunchCat GUI quit"
else
  echo "  (LaunchCat GUI not running)"
fi

echo
echo "=== 4. VERIFY: anything Wine/CoH/LaunchCat left? ==="
sleep 1
LEFT=$(ps aux | grep -iE 'wine|cityofheroes|launchcat|\.lcwine|coh/wine' | grep -v grep)
if [ -z "$LEFT" ]; then echo "  ✅ CLEAN — no Wine/CoH/LaunchCat processes remain"; else echo "$LEFT" | awk '{printf "  STILL UP pid=%s %s\n",$2,$11}'; fi
input.description: Kill wineserver, stragglers, and LaunchCat GUI; verify
